underlying_goal: Fix production bugs in Railway-deployed backend services, particularly settlement loops and tuple/dict mismatches in config sync tasks
friction_detail: Initial tuple/dict fix only covered one function; same bug existed in two other functions requiring additional fix rounds.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to check production logs and fix errors iteratively; Claude identified and fixed settlement loop bugs, enum value errors, and multiple tuple-as-dict issues across config sync tasks.
